title: Nachaliy'el #5160
definition:
Nahaliel = "torrents of God"

 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness; located north of the Arnon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nahaliel = "torrents of God"

 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness; located north of the Arnon

    NASB:  valley of God, a place E. of the Dead Sea
